data.current_summary: Search an engine using the public API
data.description_suggestion: Executes a search query against a Swiftype search engine using the public API. Accepts search parameters including query text, filters, and pagination options via the PublicSearchRequest body. Returns a SearchResponse containing matching results, facets, and metadata. Requires a valid engine key for authentication.

data.current_summary: Search an engine using the public API (GET)
data.description_suggestion: Executes a search query against a Swiftype search engine using the public API via HTTP GET method. Accepts search parameters including query text, filters, and pagination options as URL query parameters. Returns a SearchResponse containing matching results, facets, and metadata. Requires a valid engine key for authentication. Use this variant when POST is not available.

data.summary_suggestion: Get autocomplete suggestions from search engine
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves autocomplete suggestions for a partial query string from a Swiftype search engine. Accepts autocomplete parameters including query text and optional filters via the AutocompleteRequest body. Returns an AutocompleteResponse containing suggested completions and related metadata. Requires a valid engine key for authentication. Useful for implementing search-as-you-type functionality.
data.reasoning: The summary is vague and the description is empty. Improved summary to be more action-oriented and specific.
